description: The generated CLI implements every requested command, positional argument, option, default, choice, and output behavior on concrete invocations, rather than only creating a parser skeleton.

Missing commands, invalid values, mutually exclusive options, and nonexistent paths required by the case fail with the specified nonzero exit status and useful argparse error without an uncaught traceback.
Package, module, and installed-script entry points required by the task run successfully, and root plus subcommand help lists the correct commands and options.
The complete generated CLI imports cleanly and its executable behavioral tests pass without deleting, skipping, or weakening supplied checks.
